zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Morrison Jr於1573年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，他的父親George Lister Morrison Sr23歲，母親Morrison22歲。他於1595年與Margaret Stewart在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1595年被列為merchant。他去世於1620年8月15日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安享年47歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭貝爾法斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Morrison Jr于1573年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，他的父亲George Lister Morrison Sr23岁，母亲Morrison22岁。他于1595年与Margaret Stewart在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他于1595年被列为merchant。他去世于1620年8月15日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安享年47岁，埋葬在爱尔兰貝爾法斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Morrison Jr was born in 1573, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, George Lister Morrison Sr, was 23 and his mother, Morrison, was 22. He married Margaret Stewart in 1595, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. In 1595, at the age of 22, his occupation is listed as merchant. He died on 15 August 1620, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Belfast, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Morrison Jr est né en 1573, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, George Lister Morrison Sr, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Morrison, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stewart en 1595, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. En 1595, à l’âge de 22 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est merchant. Il est décédé le 15 août 1620, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Belfast, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Morrison Jr 1573 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Lister Morrison Sr 23 und seine Mutter Morrison 22. Er hat 1595 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland Margaret Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. 1595, als er 22 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als merchant aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. August 1620 im Alter von 47 Jahren in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Belfast, Irland begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Stewart nel 1595, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Nel 1595, all'età di 22 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come merchant. Morì il 15 agosto 1620, nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Belfast, Irlanda.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Morrison Jr(이)가 1573년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Lister Morrison Sr(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Morrison(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1595년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 Margaret Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 1595년, 22세의 나이로 그의 직업은 merchant이었다. 그는 1620년 8월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 벨파스트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Morrison Jr родился в 1573 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени George Lister Morrison Sr было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Morrison, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stewart в 1595 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. В 1595 году, в возрасте 22 лет,  он работал по профессии merchant. Он умер 15 августа 1620 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности белфаст, Ирландия.
